prompt: Create a cinematic fashion portrait of an androgynous young model from the shoulders up, centered slightly left, against a moody teal-blue studio background with soft haze and film grain. The model has slicked-back black hair, one ear partially visible on the right, and wears a dramatic sheer black tulle garment with voluminous translucent layers spreading across the lower half of the frame. Place a large opaque square block directly over the model’s face, centered and covering the eyes, nose, mouth, and most facial features; the block should be a muted dark teal-gray with a subtle vertical gradient, like an intentional anonymizing mask. Use cool diffused cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high-fashion editorial composition, subdued contrast, blue-green color grading, realistic texture, and a widescreen 16:9 crop. No text, no logos, no extra objects, and keep the image minimal, atmospheric, and mysterious.
